title: The Hidden Gem of Antelope Canyon

segments.text: This canyon features waves of colorful sandstone.
The colors come from sunlight hitting the sandstone walls.
Best visited when the sun is directly overhead.
An experience that feels like stepping into another world.
Follow for places that don't feel real.

description: 📍 Antelope Canyon, Arizona — USA. A captivating slot canyon with colorful sandstone waves. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
